CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Continued To Nov-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

COMPLIANCE HEARING (PER ORDER FILED 11/25/25)
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Continued To Oct-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

COMPLIANCE HEARING (PER ORDER FILED 11/25/25)

The Compliance Hearing on Class Action Settlement is CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 20, 2026, AT 9 AM IN THIS DEPARTMENT,

It appears the only outstanding issues is the 32 unnegotiated checks/payments. Plaintiff shall provide declarations accounting for the disposition of these funds, as well as discussing any other outstanding issues that may be discussed at the hearing no later than ten court days before the hearing, with courtesy copy provided to the department within 24 hours of filing.

Prior to 4/15/2026 at 8:30 am, Plaintiff shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order containing the above text verbatim.

No proposed order received. Plaintiff failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING.

Plaintiff Pilar Castillo's unopposed motion for final approval of class action settlement is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/SKF)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Scott Cole, Esq., of Cole & VAN NOTE Tel: 510.891.9800 for plaintiff.
Alexander Altman, Esq., of Polsinelli LLP. Tel: 4152482142 for defendant.

A hearing is required. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF PILAR CASTILLO , INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is Granted.

Order is Signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
